name: Chengzhi Shareholding Co., Ltd.
summary: Chengzhi Shareholding Co., Ltd. engages in the clean energy, functional materials, medical healthcare, and life science and technology related businesses in China. The company offers functional materials, such as liquid crystal material and other display chemical materials, display glass processing materials, daily chemicals, construction chemicals, and recycled wet chemicals. It also provides medical and health services. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Nanchang, China.
